---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the need, not just the solution —
the roadmap is built in the open.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or references. Note if this touches the
[Odin Platform](https://github.com/AsimAftab/Odin-Platform) contract (ingest
payload, token format, device flow) — those changes must land in both repos
together.
